title: ThrowATNT
description: When you right click a TNT in a place that isn't possible for it to get placed it will throw an ignited TNT
body:
ThrowableTNT allows you to RightClick in the air and throw a tnt(if you aren't looking at a place that can have a block placed on).
gamerule to change fuse time of the throwable tnt, the default is 60 ticks.
- fuseTicksThrowTNT
